MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT JONI DACUYCUY-
WONG and KALAMI WONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND -- Granted, 10 days leave to answer or otherwise respond. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On Ap R29, 2003.
Off Calendar May-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff, Trinity Capital Corp., representative: Ernest Knowles,VP. present with counsel, Douglas Holloway.
Plaintiff's witness, Ernest Knowles was sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants as follows:
Principal $28,492.90, Interest $726.33, Attorney's fees $2,500.00, Costs $344.50, for a total judgment of $32,063.73
Plaintiff is also has immediate right and entitled to possession of leased equipment listed on the judgment, Defendants shall receive all credits to which they are entitled by law.
Does 1-10 are dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.
